_comment: Owner-confirmed media facts. This file is the ONLY place confirmed facts enter the media inventory: generate_media_inventory.py applies these to every placement of the listed assets and NEVER overwrites them with text extracted from pages. Facts recorded here must come from explicit owner statements (see docs/PROJECT_OPERATING_MANUAL.md sections 3 and 17). Do not add entries from filenames, visual appearance, or existing captions.

owner_facts.project_name: Bing Crosby Ranch walnut floor refinishing

TRICIA WALNUT102.jpg.notes: One of four photographs confirmed to be from the same walnut refinishing project at Bing Crosby Ranch, San Diego. NOT a separate bamboo, parquet, maple, Rancho Santa Fe, or La Jolla project (previous homepage alt text was false and has been corrected). Exact stage/angle not yet confirmed - do not label before/after/sanding/bare wood/finish application.

owner_facts.project_name: Bing Crosby Ranch walnut floor refinishing

TRICIA WALNUT110.jpg.notes: One of four confirmed Bing Crosby Ranch walnut photos. Previous homepage alt text falsely described a bamboo deep-clean/recoat; corrected in Milestone 2.5.

known_conflicts.TRICIA WALNUT27.jpg: Filename suggests the TRICIA WALNUT project, but the visible Solid Wood Gallery project describes Graff Brothers solid rift & quartered WHITE OAK installation. Owner must confirm which identity is correct. Not covered by the four-image walnut confirmation.
known_conflicts.TRICIA WALNUT30.jpg: Same filename-vs-description conflict as TRICIA WALNUT27.jpg (white oak installation project on the Solid Wood Gallery).
